prompt: My 3D forge renders are coming out completely washed out - the vision API is scoring them 1.5/10. The model geometry looks fine when I open the .blend file manually. I'm using set_render_settings with engine EEVEE and 2048x2048. My lighting setup creates a point light at (5,5,5) with energy 10 and the background is white. Also shade_smooth keeps failing with a bpy_prop_collection error when I call blender_cleanup with action shade_smooth. Can you help me fix both issues?

assertions.text: Identifies white bg as problem, recommends gray ~0.18
Suggests 3-point lighting (key, fill, rim) relative to model
Identifies EEVEE should be lowercase eevee
Provides execute_python per-object loop fix for shade_smooth
Mentions camera auto-framing from bounding box
Corrects blender_cleanup and notes no blender_ prefix on MCP calls
